title: ProDec Swivel Pot Hook for Securely Hanging Paint Cans and Other Containers for Hands Free Access & Improved Safety When Using Ladders & Scaffolding, 360 Degree Swivel Action
features: Ideal for securely attaching up to 5 litre paint cans and kettles to ladders and scaffolding for easy hands free access
Also suitable for other containers to keep eg. nails and screws handy
Secure clasp for safe grip of container
Swivel end gives full 360 degree turning
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint A helping hand to work safely on ladders This handy pot hook is essential for anyone using ladders when decorating, doing away with the need for constant trips up and down the ladder to reload your brush or roller. Made from heavy duty rust-resistant stainless steel, it features a secure clasp that safely grips paint cans and kettles up to 5 litres, and a universal hook that enables them to be securely attached to ladders and scaffolding for easy hands free access. The swivel end rotates through a full 360 degrees so you can turn the can/kettle handle out of the way, enabling you to concentrate on being safe. It is also suitable for any other container with a handle that is often used to keep nails, screws and other consumables or small tools to hand. Solutions for painting masonry from ProDec ProDec has a range of tools to make painting masonry easier, so whether the surface is a lightly textured render or a demanding pebbledash, we've got everything you need to do the job right. Preparation brushes There are few other surfaces where preparation before painting is as critical as it is for masonry. ProDec has a range of wire and stiff fibre hand brushes to help remove dirt, grime, algae and more to ensure optimum paint adhesion and give a long lasting finish. Paint rollers Made using durable fabrics that stand up to the demands of rough surfaces, ProDec has a range of longer pile rollers that hold plenty of paint and are effective at getting into surface textures for rapid application without missing areas. As well as standard cage rollers, a range of ultra heavy duty padded rollers is also available. Paint brushes ProDec has flat brushes and block brushes that are tailored to masonry surfaces and deliver paint right into even heavy textures for fast, efficient coverage. Extension poles Working off the ground and above head height means you're less mobile, so efficiency is key. Using an extension pole greatly increases your reach and ProDec has rugged, trade quality poles than can withstand heavy duty use with even the biggest rollers and on the roughest surfaces. Paint scuttles Scuttles hold much more paint than trays, meaning that you don't have to regularly reload them and enabling you to work more quickly and efficiently. ProDec scuttles feature a robust construction and a low centre of gravity when full of paint, so they're not easily knocked over. Telescopic ladders Robust yet lightweight, ProDec's telescopic ladders extend to a range of heights for maximum flexibility. They are loaded with features to keep you safe, including 150kg load bearing capacity, soft close rung collapse mechanism and rubber footers for maximum stability. Work platforms Lightweight and portable, our range of aluminium platforms extend your reach vertically and gives increased left to right reach compared to stepladders. They fold down to a compact size quickly and easily for transport and storage. Swivel pot hook A simple yet incredibly useful tool that safely grips paint cans and kettles up to 5 litres, with a universal hook that enables it to be securely attached to ladders and scaffolding for easy hands free access.
